title: hieracium bourgaei subsp. trichodermum
intro: Hieracium bourgaei subsp. trichodermum is a plant species within the sunflower family, characterized by its fern-like leaves and small yellow flowers. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Hieracium bourgaei subsp. trichodermum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
